description_long: This is a plush, modern armchair upholstered in rich brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The chair features a wide, thickly padded seat and a tall, gently curved backrest for ample support and comfort. Both armrests are broad and rounded, seamlessly integrated into the chair's overall form, and the stitching detail is visible along the edges, adding a touch of craftsmanship. The base of the chair is low and solid, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. The back of the chair is fully covered in the same leather material, maintaining a consistent look from all angles. This chair is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale lounges.
description: A modern, brown leather armchair with wide, padded armrests and a tall, curved backrest, featuring visible stitching and a solid, legless base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, tall backrest, and broad armrests with visible stitching.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick padding of the backrest and armrest, as well as the chair's low, solid base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully covered leather back and the seamless integration of the armrests and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the thick armrest and backrest padding seen in view 1.
